title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor introduced Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that run on schedules or are triggered by events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, and PagerDuty. The agents perform autonomous coding tasks based on these event triggers or scheduled intervals.
